expectations.text: References at least one script by filename
expectations.evidence: References 7 scripts by filename: analyze_metrics.py (Phase 1.5), alert_quality_checker.py (Phase 4.3), slo_calculator.py (Phase 4.1), dashboard_generator.py (Phase 5.2), health_check_validator.py (Phase 6.2), log_analyzer.py (Summary table), and cluster_health.py (Phase 1.5). Summary table at end lists all 6 monitoring scripts.

Multiple runnable CLI commands provided, e.g.: 'helm install monitoring prometheus-community/kube-prometheus-stack --namespace monitoring --create-namespace ...', 'python3 scripts/slo_calculator.py --table', 'python3 scripts/dashboard_generator.py webapp --title "${service} Dashboard" --service ${service} --output dashboards/${service}.json', 'python3 scripts/health_check_validator.py https://api-gateway.prod/healthz ...', 'helm install loki grafana/loki-stack ...', 'helm install tempo grafana/tempo ...'.

expectations.text: Links to a relevant reference file
expectations.evidence: References 6 reference files throughout the document with inline callouts: 'references/tool_comparison.md' (Executive Summary), 'references/metrics_design.md' (Phases 1.2 and 1.3), 'references/logging_guide.md' (Phase 2.2), 'references/tracing_guide.md' (Phase 3.1), 'references/slo_sla_guide.md' (Phase 4.1), 'references/alerting_best_practices.md' (Phase 4.2). Summary table at end consolidates all references.

Response is organized into 6 sequential phases matching the skill's workflow: Phase 1 (Foundation: Prometheus + metrics instrumentation), Phase 2 (Logging: Loki + structured logs), Phase 3 (Distributed Tracing: Tempo + OTel), Phase 4 (Alerting: SLO-based burn rate alerts), Phase 5 (Dashboards: Grafana hierarchy), Phase 6 (Health Checks: pre-launch validation), plus Post-Launch operations. This follows the monitoring-observability skill's decision-tree pattern (Setup from scratch -> metrics -> logs -> traces -> alerts -> dashboards).

Six numbered phases with sub-steps (1.1-1.5, 2.1-2.5, 3.1-3.6, 4.1-4.5, 5.1-5.4, 6.1-6.2) provide sequential implementation guidance. Implementation Timeline table maps phases to weeks. Post-Launch section adds ongoing monthly SLO reviews and quarterly tuning steps.
